name: Parasocial Studio
description: Shape safe closeness mechanics like acknowledgements, voice-note drops, recurring touchpoints, and boundary language, then output a relationship cadence plan.
short_description: Plan safe closeness rhythms for public figures.
audience: Talent teams designing audience touchpoints with clear boundaries
Creator strategists planning warm but scalable acknowledgement rhythms
Founder-led brands reviewing closeness mechanics before they create unhealthy expectations
detail_lines: Converts current touchpoints, tone goals, maturity signals, and operational limits into a cadence plan.
Makes boundary language, refusal patterns, red flags, and stop conditions first-class parts of the output.
Works only from public or user-authorized inputs and rejects pseudo-romantic framing, dependency hooks, harassment, and covert profiling.
